title: Lesson: Blind War SB vs BB + BB vs SB
plan: Read 2 PDFs (RegLife-OConceitodeBlindWar-SBvsBB, RegLife-BLINDWARBBVSSB) to extract SB open ranges, BB defense/3-bet ranges, sizings, and adjustments
Add SB blind war hand range constants (tiered) and BB blind war defense range constants to lesson_classifier.py
Enhance _eval_sb_vs_bb() to validate SB open hand against blind war range tiers and sizing
Enhance _eval_bb_vs_sb() to validate BB defense/3-bet response against hand strength vs SB range
Verify lesson seed entries for lessons 7 and 9 in seed_lessons.py are correct
Add/update unit tests in test_lesson_classifier.py for blind war scenarios
Run quality gates (typecheck, lint, tests, build)
Update prd.json status and batch tracking files
